pokemon:coalossal.name: Coalossal
pokemon:coalossal.summary: While it’s engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: While it’s engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area.
It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: While it’s engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area.

pokemon:carkol.name: Carkol
pokemon:carkol.summary: By rapidly rolling its legs, it can travel at over 18 mph. The temperature of the flames it breathes exceeds 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: By rapidly rolling its legs, it can travel at over 18 mph. The temperature of the flames it breathes exceeds 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.
It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: By rapidly rolling its legs, it can travel at over 18 mph. The temperature of the flames it breathes exceeds 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

pokemon:rolycoly.name: Rolycoly
pokemon:rolycoly.summary: It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.
Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.
